entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum L., the crop studied for kernel hardness and related traits

entities.name: KERNEL HARDNESS
entities.description: A texture characteristic used to classify wheat into soft and hard classes, determining milling and baking quality

entities.name: MILLING QUALITY
entities.description: A quality attribute of wheat determined by kernel hardness

entities.name: BAKING QUALITY
entities.description: A quality attribute of wheat determined by kernel hardness

entities.name: EXTRA-SOFT
entities.description: A classification of wheat with kernel hardness at the lower end of the spectrum, associated with superior end-use quality

entities.name: MILLING YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic trait studied in relation to kernel hardness

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General category of traits studied in the recombinant inbred line population

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying genetic factors controlling specific traits

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATION
entities.description: A population derived from a cross between soft and extra-soft wheat used for trait mapping

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with the control of specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: BREAK FLOUR YIELD
entities.description: A specific trait for which significant QTL were identified

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 1BS
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness and break flour yield were detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 4BS
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness, break flour yield, and agronomic traits were detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 5BS
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness and break flour yield were detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 2DS
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness and break flour yield were detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 4DS
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness, break flour yield, and agronomic traits were detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 5DL
entities.description: Genomic location where QTL for kernel hardness and break flour yield were detected

entities.name: XBARC1118-RHT-D1
entities.description: A marker/region on chromosome 4DS associated with kernel hardness

entities.name: XWMC617-RHT-B1
entities.description: A marker/region on chromosome 4BS associated with kernel hardness

entities.name: HARDNESS HA LOCUS
entities.description: A locus on chromosome 5DS that does not control the extra-soft characteristic

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 5DS
entities.description: Genomic location of the Hardness (Ha) locus

entities.name: RHT-D1
entities.description: A semidwarf gene on chromosome 4DS associated with agronomic traits

entities.name: RHT-B1
entities.description: A semidwarf gene on chromosome 4BS associated with agronomic traits

entities.name: PLEIOTROPIC EFFECTS
entities.description: The phenomenon where a single gene affects multiple traits

entities.name: TIGHT LINKAGE
entities.description: The close proximity of genes on a chromosome controlling various traits
